---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Henry John Chitty Harper"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Henry John Chitty Harper

**Dates:** (1804-1893)

### Description

  Bishop of Christchurch and primate of New Zealand

### Biography

[LG 1952]

### Letters

- Letter from October 3, 1868.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
